---
title: "Welcome"
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: article
description: "A structured, project-based path through smart meter data: ML foundations, disaggregation, grid-edge value, and forecasting, from raw signal to business insight."
---

<div class="cover-hero column-page">
<div class="cover-hero-row">
<div class="cover-hero-text">
<p class="cover-eyebrow">A practical book for energy analytics and ML practitioners</p>
<h1>Machine Learning for Smart Meter Data</h1>
<p>From raw meter signal to business decision, through the ML foundations, disaggregation, and grid-edge value that make the closing forecast worth trusting, built to be run, not just read.</p>

<div class="cover-stat-row">
<div class="cover-stat"><span class="stat-value">342</span><span class="stat-label">Real households</span></div>
<div class="cover-stat"><span class="stat-value">16</span><span class="stat-label">Appliance types</span></div>
<div class="cover-stat"><span class="stat-value">19</span><span class="stat-label">Chapters live</span></div>
</div>

<p class="cover-author">By <a href="https://sambaiga.github.io/" style="color:#38BDF8;font-weight:600">Anthony Faustine</a>&nbsp;&nbsp;<a href="https://github.com/sambaiga" title="GitHub" style="color:#94A3B8"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>&nbsp;<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/sambaiga" title="LinkedIn" style="color:#94A3B8"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>&nbsp;<a href="mailto:sambaiga@gmail.com" title="Email" style="color:#94A3B8"><i class="bi bi-envelope-at"></i></a></p>

<div class="cover-cta-row">
<a href="preface.qmd" class="btn-cover btn-primary-cover"><i class="bi bi-book"></i> Read the preface</a>
<a href="https://github.com/sambaiga/ml-energy-disaggregation" class="btn-cover btn-secondary-cover"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> View on GitHub</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="cover-hero-visual" role="img" aria-label="A meter signal flows through data analytics and ML into business value">
<div class="hero-visual-row">
<div class="signal-node signal-node-meter">
<span class="signal-icon"><i class="bi bi-speedometer2"></i></span>
<span class="signal-node-label">Meter Signal</span>
</div>
<span class="signal-connector"></span>
<div class="signal-node signal-node-model">
<span class="signal-icon"><i class="bi bi-cpu-fill"></i></span>
<span class="signal-node-label">Data &amp; ML</span>
</div>
<span class="signal-connector"></span>
<div class="signal-node signal-node-value">
<span class="signal-icon"><i class="bi bi-bullseye"></i></span>
<span class="signal-node-label">Business Value</span>
</div>
</div>
<p class="hero-visual-caption">The arc every chapter follows</p>
</div>
</div>

<p class="pipeline-flow-label">The book, in eight parts</p>
<div class="pipeline-flow">
<div class="pipeline-step">
<span class="pipeline-dot pipeline-dot-1"><i class="bi bi-activity"></i></span>
<span class="pipeline-label">Signal Foundations</span>
</div>
<span class="pipeline-arrow">&#8594;</span>
<div class="pipeline-step">
<span class="pipeline-dot pipeline-dot-2"><i class="bi bi-cpu-fill"></i></span>
<span class="pipeline-label">ML Foundations</span>
</div>
<span class="pipeline-arrow">&#8594;</span>
<div class="pipeline-step"><a class="pipeline-step-link" href="book/03-disaggregation/01-what-is-nilm.qmd"><span class="pipeline-dot pipeline-dot-3"><i class="bi bi-plug-fill"></i></span><span class="pipeline-label">Disaggregation</span></a></div>
<span class="pipeline-arrow">&#8594;</span>
<div class="pipeline-step"><a class="pipeline-step-link" href="book/04-network-foundations/01-opendss-lv-modeling.qmd"><span class="pipeline-dot pipeline-dot-4"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill"></i></span><span class="pipeline-label">Network Foundations</span></a></div>
<span class="pipeline-arrow">&#8594;</span>
<div class="pipeline-step"><a class="pipeline-step-link" href="book/05-clustering/01-clustering-foundations.qmd"><span class="pipeline-dot pipeline-dot-5"><i class="bi bi-diagram-2-fill"></i></span><span class="pipeline-label">Clustering</span></a></div>
<span class="pipeline-arrow">&#8594;</span>
<div class="pipeline-step"><a class="pipeline-step-link" href="book/06-ranking-recommendation/01-ranking-recommendation.qmd"><span class="pipeline-dot pipeline-dot-6"><i class="bi bi-sort-down"></i></span><span class="pipeline-label">Ranking</span></a></div>
<span class="pipeline-arrow">&#8594;</span>
<div class="pipeline-step"><a class="pipeline-step-link" href="book/07-anomaly-detection/01-anomaly-detection.qmd"><span class="pipeline-dot pipeline-dot-7"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i></span><span class="pipeline-label">Anomaly Detection</span></a></div>
<span class="pipeline-arrow">&#8594;</span>
<div class="pipeline-step"><a class="pipeline-step-link" href="book/08-forecasting/01-forecastability.qmd"><span class="pipeline-dot pipeline-dot-8"><i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i></span><span class="pipeline-label">Forecasting</span></a></div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="column-page">

<p class="section-label">Your learning path</p>

<div class="roadmap-grid">

<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-1"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-activity act-icon act-icon-1"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Part 1 · Signal Foundations</span>
<p class="act-desc">Reading a meter signal, general event and change detection, and feature-engineering concepts every later part reuses.</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
<li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">01</span><span class="ch-name">Reading a meter signal</span><span class="ch-soon">Soon</span></span></li>
</ul>
<p class="act-note">Chapters land after Part 8 ships.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-2"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-cpu-fill act-icon act-icon-2"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Part 2 · ML Foundations</span>
<p class="act-desc">The mathematical and statistical theory behind every model this book uses as a tool: learning theory, optimization, tree ensembles, deep architectures, and the uncertainty-quantification foundations Part 8's own forecasts depend on.</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
<li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">01</span><span class="ch-name">What is machine learning, precisely</span><span class="ch-soon">Soon</span></span></li>
</ul>
<p class="act-note">Chapters land after Part 8 ships.</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-3"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-plug-fill act-icon act-icon-3"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Part 3 · Disaggregation</span>
<p class="act-desc">Non-intrusive load monitoring: from the aggregate signal to appliance-level insight.</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
<li><a href="book/03-disaggregation/01-what-is-nilm.qmd"><span class="ch-num">01</span><span class="ch-name">Non-Intrusive Load Monitoring</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
<li><a href="book/03-disaggregation/02-feature-engineering.qmd"><span class="ch-num">02</span><span class="ch-name">Appliance Recognition</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
<li><a href="book/03-disaggregation/03-multi-appliance-recognition.qmd"><span class="ch-num">03</span><span class="ch-name">Multi-Appliance Recognition</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
<li><a href="book/03-disaggregation/04-multi-task-low-frequency.qmd"><span class="ch-num">04</span><span class="ch-name">Multi-Task Deep Learning</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-4"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill act-icon act-icon-4"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Part 4 · LV Network and Topology Foundations</span>
<p class="act-desc">Modeling the low-voltage network, simulating DER time series on it, and identifying phase from smart-meter data alone, all with open-source power-flow simulation the rest of the book reuses.</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
<li><a href="book/04-network-foundations/01-opendss-lv-modeling.qmd"><span class="ch-num">01</span><span class="ch-name">Modeling the Low-Voltage Network</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
<li><a href="book/04-network-foundations/02-timeseries-der-modeling.qmd"><span class="ch-num">02</span><span class="ch-name">Time-Series Simulation and DER Modeling</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
<li><a href="book/04-network-foundations/03-phase-identification.qmd"><span class="ch-num">03</span><span class="ch-name">Phase Identification from Smart-Meter Data</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-5"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-diagram-2-fill act-icon act-icon-5"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Part 5 · Clustering</span>
<p class="act-desc">Theoretical foundations of clustering under DER, a settled methodology validated across three real utilities, then applying it to real customers across those utilities and to real feeders at scale.</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
<li><a href="book/05-clustering/01-clustering-foundations.qmd"><span class="ch-num">01</span><span class="ch-name">Clustering Foundations</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
<li><a href="book/05-clustering/02-clustering-methodology.qmd"><span class="ch-num">02</span><span class="ch-name">Clustering Methodology</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
<li><a href="book/05-clustering/03-customer-feeder-clustering.qmd"><span class="ch-num">03</span><span class="ch-name">Customer Clustering Across Three Utilities</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
<li><a href="book/05-clustering/04-feeder-level-clustering.qmd"><span class="ch-num">04</span><span class="ch-name">Feeder-Level Clustering at Scale</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-6"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-sort-down act-icon act-icon-6"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Part 6 · Ranking and Recommendation</span>
<p class="act-desc">Retrieval, ranking, and case-based recommendation for LV management under DER, checked against real, OpenDSS-simulated per-customer outcomes.</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
<li><a href="book/06-ranking-recommendation/01-ranking-recommendation.qmd"><span class="ch-num">01</span><span class="ch-name">Ranking and Recommendation under DER</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-7"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill act-icon act-icon-7"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Part 7 · Anomaly Detection</span>
<p class="act-desc">Voltage-violation and power-quality anomaly detection combining smart-meter data and LV topology, beyond what a single meter can see alone.</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
<li><a href="book/07-anomaly-detection/01-anomaly-detection.qmd"><span class="ch-num">01</span><span class="ch-name">Anomaly Detection Beyond the Meter</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-8"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow act-icon act-icon-8"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Part 8 · Forecasting</span>
<p class="act-desc">Household-scale load, PV, and EV forecastability and uncertainty, built on Twiga. The book's closing part, feeding its own forecasts back into Part 4's LV network model.</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
<li><a href="book/08-forecasting/01-forecastability.qmd"><span class="ch-num">01</span><span class="ch-name">Household Smart-Meter Forecastability</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
<li><a href="book/08-forecasting/02-scaling-archetypes.qmd"><span class="ch-num">02</span><span class="ch-name">Scaling to Hundreds of Meters</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
<li><a href="book/08-forecasting/03-probabilistic-forecasting.qmd"><span class="ch-num">03</span><span class="ch-name">What a Probabilistic Forecast Is Actually Worth</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
<li><a href="book/08-forecasting/04-foundation-models.qmd"><span class="ch-num">04</span><span class="ch-name">Do Foundation Models Fail Like Everything Else Does?</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
<li><a href="book/08-forecasting/05-what-if-scenario-analysis.qmd"><span class="ch-num">05</span><span class="ch-name">What the Grid Actually Faces When These Forecasts Come True</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
<li><a href="book/08-forecasting/06-lv-state-estimation.qmd"><span class="ch-num">06</span><span class="ch-name">Can Smart-Meter Readings Fill In What the Grid Cannot See</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<p style="color:#94A3B8;font-size:0.85rem;">17 chapters shipped so far, each with a runnable notebook. <a href="https://github.com/sambaiga/ml-energy-disaggregation" style="color:#64748B">Follow progress on GitHub</a>.</p>

</div>
